name: scenario-already-running
description: Test Status=In Progress / Run Test? already checked while a run is active. Airtable may queue a second automation run; document race risk for dual creates.

expected_created_records.note: Race: two concurrent 115 runs can create two Submissions — no mutex in script

safe_rerun_behavior: Avoid double-trigger; wait for Last Run At update
cleanup_instructions: Delete extra Submissions if race occurs
manual_requirements: Do not double-click Run Test? in UI
